# Auto-generated walkthrough guide

# take keycard Family Zoo By Sharpee Tutorial Type HELP for instructions.
#   Taken.
> take keycard
# south Main Path A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
#   Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside
#   the path.
> south
# Unlock the gate
# unlock gate with keycard You unlock staff gate with staff keycard.
> unlock gate with keycard
# open gate You open staff gate.
> open gate
# south Supply Room A cluttered storage room behind the staff gate. Metal
#   shelves line the walls. A cork board on the wall is covered with staff
#   schedules.
> south
# take flashlight Taken.
> take flashlight
# DEATH
# south It is pitch dark. You are likely to be eaten by a grue.
> south
# look It's pitch dark, and you can't see a thing.
> look
# north Supply Room A cluttered storage room behind the staff gate. Metal
#   shelves line the walls. A cork board on the wall is covered with staff
#   schedules.
> north
# switch on flashlight The flashlight switches on, banishing the darkness.
#   *DING DONG* "Attention visitors! Two hours until closing.
> switch on flashlight
# south Nocturnal Animals Exhibit A cool, dimly lit cavern designed to
#   simulate nighttime. Glass enclosures line both walls with soft red lights.
> south
# look Nocturnal Animals Exhibit A cool, dimly lit cavern designed to simulate
#   nighttime. Glass enclosures line both walls with soft red lights.
> look
# examine owl An enormous barn owl with a heart-shaped white face.
> examine owl
# examine galagos Two bush babies with impossibly large round eyes.
> examine galagos
# north Supply Room A cluttered storage room behind the staff gate. Metal
#   shelves line the walls. A cork board on the wall is covered with staff
#   schedules.
> north
